blocks.description: Program header comment block with study ID (XYZ-301), author, protocol, change log (v1.0–v1.5); SECTION 1 environment setup with OPTIONS (mprint, mlogic, symbolgen, msglevel=i); LIBNAME definitions for sdtm (read-only), adam, output, and metadata libraries; global macro variables for study_id, cutoff_date, sponsor, sap_version, run_dt and run_tm via %SYSFUNC(today/time), and analysis_rc return code
%INCLUDE for study_macros.sas shared clinical trial utility macro library

%MACRO derive_adsl(study=): derives ADaM-compliant subject-level analysis dataset; PROC SORT on sdtm.dm, sdtm.ds, metadata.randlist then three-way MERGE by USUBJID; age group derivation (agegr1/agegr1n), sex/race numeric coding via SELECT/WHEN, study duration via INTCK('day', rfxstdt, cutoff), treatment duration via INTCK; population flags (ITTFL, SAFFL, PPFL, COMPLFL) per SAP; treatment label assignment; CALL SYMPUTX for first subject ID; PROC SQL to capture ADSL record count into &adsl_nobs; %IF &syserr error check setting &analysis_rc

%MACRO derive_adae(study=): derives adverse event analysis dataset; PROC SORT on sdtm.ae and adam.adsl then MERGE by USUBJID filtered to safety population (saffl='Y'); severity grading via SELECT/WHEN (MILD=1, MODERATE=2, SEVERE=3), SAE flag derivation, AE duration (aeendt - aestdt + 1 with minimum 1-day floor), onset study day (aestdy) relative to first dose date, drug relationship numeric coding (NOT RELATED=0 through DEFINITE=4), treatment-emergent AE flag (trtemfl); PROC SQL to capture record and subject counts into &adae_nobs and &adae_nsubj; %IF &syserr error handling

%MACRO efficacy_analysis(endpoint=, method=, covars=): performs primary efficacy analysis with method-dependent branching; PROC MEANS for descriptive statistics (n, mean, std, median, min, max) by treatment arm on ITT population; %IF ANCOVA branch runs PROC GLM with class/model/lsmeans and ODS OUTPUT for LSMeans, Diff, OverallANOVA, then DATA _null_ extracts treatment p-value via CALL SYMPUTX; %ELSE IF LOGISTIC branch runs PROC LOGISTIC with class/model/oddsratio and ODS OUTPUT for OddsRatios, ParameterEstimates, GlobalTests, then DATA _null_ extracts odds ratio and CI via CALL SYMPUTX; %ELSE branch logs unknown method error; final %IF &syserr error check

%MACRO safety_tables: generates AE incidence tables by SOC and preferred term for 4 categories (TEAE, SAE, DRUG_RELATED, LEADING_TO_DISC) using indexed macro variable arrays; PROC SQL to get per-arm denominator counts (&n_trt1, &n_trt2, &n_plac) from safety population; %DO i=1 %TO &ncat loop with %IF/%ELSE IF conditional filtering per category, PROC FREQ cross-tabulation (aebodsys*aedecod*trt01pn), DATA step computing incidence rates with SELECT/WHEN denominators, PROC TRANSPOSE to wide format, DATA step computing rate differences (active minus placebo) for output.table_14_3_&i; final %IF &syserr error check

Main program execution section: %PUT run start notes with timestamps; sequential invocation of %derive_adsl(study=&study_id), %derive_adae(study=&study_id), %efficacy_analysis with ANCOVA method for chg_primary endpoint, %efficacy_analysis with LOGISTIC method for responder_flag endpoint, and %safety_tables

PROC SQL creating output.table_14_1 (Table 14.1: Demographics and Baseline Characteristics) from adam.adsl: aggregates by trt01p with COUNT DISTINCT for n_subjects, MEAN/STD/MEDIAN/MIN/MAX for age, CASE-WHEN sums for sex (n_male, n_female) and race (n_white, n_black, n_asian, n_other_race) with computed percentage columns, MEAN for study and treatment duration, and population flag counts (ITT, PP, Safety, Completed)

PROC PRINT of output.table_14_1 demographics table with TITLE statements (Table 14.1, study ID, population, SAP version), LABEL statement for all columns (Treatment Arm, N, Mean Age, SD Age, % Male, % Female, race counts, durations, population counts), and TITLE reset

%IF &analysis_rc NE 0 OR &syserr NE 0 error handling: %PUT ERROR messages with pipeline status; DATA _null_ writes error flag file with STATUS, STUDY, RUN_DATE, ANALYSIS_RC, SYSERR, PROGRAM; FILENAME EMAIL to biostat-team@pharmacorp.com with alert subject; DATA _null_ writes email body with failure details; %ELSE success branch: %PUT NOTE completion messages with ADSL/ADAE counts; DATA _null_ writes success flag file with STATUS=SUCCESS and dataset counts

PROC DATASETS cleanup deleting intermediate work datasets (dm_sorted, ds_sorted, rand_sorted, adsl_for_ae, ae_sorted, ae_filtered_:, ae_freq_:, ae_rates_:, ae_wide_:, desc_:, lsmeans_:, lsdiff_:, anova_:, or_:, parms_:, global_:)
Reset OPTIONS to nomprint/nomlogic/nosymbolgen and final %PUT completion messages with program name and end timestamp via %SYSFUNC(datetime(), datetime20.)
